Feeback 1: More uniform color coordination with functionality in the overlay.
Feedback 2: The block and goal task was a bit difficult, but that was mostly me being slow.
Feedback 3: I think the buttons in the "Record" section were pretty well designed to give a flow state to the user, making them less prone to making a mistake.
